compiled_state.title: Implement update-artifacts.sh orchestrator with stale detection and merge dispatch
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create plugins/dso/scripts/update-artifacts.sh — the orchestrator script callable as `dso update-artifacts`. Sources artifact-merge-lib.sh for merge functions. Reads version stamps from installed artifacts, determines staleness, applies per-artifact merge strategy, and updates stamps on success.

### Implementation:
1. Source artifact-merge-lib.sh from same directory
2. Read plugin version from plugin.json (python3 one-liner)
3. For each of 4 artifacts:
   a. Read version stamp (grep for # dso-version: or ^x-dso-version:)
   b. Compare against plugin version
   c. If stale or legacy: apply merge strategy
      - Shim: overwrite from plugin template, re-stamp
      - Config: merge_config_file (key-additive merge)
      - Pre-commit: merge_precommit_hooks (existing logic from shared lib)
      - CI: merge_ci_workflow (python3+yaml primary, awk fallback)
   d. On success: update version stamp via stamp_artifact (from S1 Task 3)
   e. On conflict (merge returns 2): collect conflict JSON, exit 2
4. Exit 0 on success, 2 on any conflict

### Platform detection:
Uses _base64_nowrap_flag() from artifact-merge-lib.sh for conflict JSON base64 encoding.

### Files to create
- plugins/dso/scripts/update-artifacts.sh

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/scripts/update-artifacts.sh | create |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — all RED tests turn GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/update-artifacts.sh
- [ ] `dso update-artifacts` dispatches correctly via shim
  Verify: T=$(mktemp -d) && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh "$T" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cd "$T" && .claude/scripts/dso update-artifacts 2>/dev/null; RC=$?; cd /; rm -rf "$T"; test $RC -eq 0 -o $RC -eq 2
- [ ] Stale artifact detected and updated: downgrade a stamp, run update, verify stamp matches current
  Verify: T=$(mktemp -d) && S=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash "$S/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh" "$T" "$S/plugins/dso" >/dev/null 2>&1 && sed -i.bak 's/dso-version:.*/dso-version: 0.0.0/' "$T/.claude/scripts/dso" && cd "$T" && bash "$S/plugins/dso/scripts/update-artifacts.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && head -5 "$T/.claude/scripts/dso" | grep -q "$(python3 -c "import json;print(json.load(open('$S/plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json'))['version'])")" && rm -rf "$T"
- [ ] Conflict produces exit code 2
  Verify: manual review — test-update-artifacts.sh test_update_conflict_exit_code_2

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required. Document all assumptions.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — update-artifacts.sh implemented, 33/33 tests pass.
comments.author: Test
